scripts.lint:ui8px: ui8px lint internal/views internal/ui web/static/css/input.css web/static/css/latty-icons.css --ignore .fastygo
scripts.validate:aria: ui8px validate aria internal/views internal/ui --manifest web/static/js/manifest.json --ignore .fastygo web/static/css/ui8kit
scripts.test:e2e:ci: playwright install chromium && bun run build:e2e-server && playwright test
scripts.verify: go tool templ generate ./... && bun run build:css && bun run docs:sync-specs && bun run validate:spec && bun run docs:build && bun run docs:snapshot && bun run lint:ui8px && bun run validate:aria && bun run validate:html && go test ./... && bun run test:e2e:ci
scripts.go: go tool templ generate ./... && bun run build:css && node scripts/run-server.mjs
